calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:04am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Allan Horning, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
Cause called for Small Claims appeal.
Pearl Ibeanusi, respondent, appears in Pro Per; appellant Northern California Martin Luther King, Jr., Birthday Committee, appears in Pro Per through representative Jackie Keys-Cuidri.
Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Witness, Sigan Keys, previously sworn, testifies on behalf of appellant. Ebioc Ibeanusi, previously sworn, testifes on behalf of
respondent.
11:31am
Matter is submitted, no evidence is identified or admitted.
